stemHtml: Yaw damper is a system used to…

options.a: prevent Dutch roll, by moving the ailerons while the control column stays fixed.
options.b: prevent Dutch roll, by moving the rudder while the rudder pedals remain fixed.
options.c: increase the Mach Number to improve aerodynamic damping of any subsequent Dutch roll motion.
options.d: provide stability during manual control and autopilot use, as long as the FD is on.
